title: hebe hectorii
intro: Hebe hectorii, also known as the Hector's hebe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, native to New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Hebe hectorii include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hebe hectorii include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Hebe hectorii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
